summary: FINAL AAA multiplayer card migration E2E testing complete. All 3 new canonical rooms (Gin Rummy / Rummy / War) work end-to-end — backend rule engines, route wiring, variant + density styling, progress-pill semantics, and legacy redirects all validated. Prior-5 AAA regression holds. 15/15 backend pytest cases pass; all 7 legacy redirects, 3 GamesNew tile navigations, and 3 new room lobby->game flows pass. South seat correctly hidden across all 8 rooms. User can safely ship.
critical_code_review_comments: Route file quality is good: all 3 new practice routers follow the same pattern, use per-user _MATCHES dict (acceptable for single-pod preview; consider Redis-backed store for multi-pod scale — NOT a blocker).
Gin Rummy deadwood>10 knock rejection returns HTTP 400 with 'Cannot knock with deadwood > 10' — matches spec.
Rummy stock_count math verified: 108 - 4*13 - 1 discard - 1 wildcard = 54 exactly.
War engine correctly terminates (tested 80 rounds; phase transitions to 'finished'; match_winner can be null for stalemate — handled).
SpadesTable variants gold/jade/ruby + density 4p/2p attributes render on DOM (data-variant, data-density) — verified via Playwright getAttribute.
Shared /app/backend/utils/meld_detection.py is reused by both Gin Rummy and Rummy — good DRY.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of critical flows (3 new rooms + 7 legacy redirects + 3 tile clicks + 3/5 prior AAA start-btns auto-detected; Spades/Bid-Whist lobby start-btn testids differ from the 'spades-aaa/bid-whist-aaa' convention — not a bug, just a naming note; prior iteration validated these)

seed_data_creation: None — demo-login auto-provisions a guest session each run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 multiplayer card rooms (Spades/BidWhist/Hearts/CrazyEights/GoFish/GinRummy/Rummy/War) are now on the universal SpadesTable prototype. Backend practice routers follow identical start/draw-stock/take-discard/discard/new-hand patterns — reuse /app/backend/tests/test_final_aaa_games.py as the regression harness. Response shape note: game view exposes `your_hand` (south only) + `players_data[seat].card_count`; no top-level `hands` map. Rummy 4P stock=54; 2P only deals to north+south. War match reliably finishes within ~80 rounds for default 50-round cap. Known benign noise still present: Privy 403, CSP frame-ancestors (Privy iframe blocked), WebGL performance warnings, WS close-before-open on vibe-phone/friend-events endpoints — all pre-existing per earlier iterations.

e2e_validation_table.Gin Rummy: variant=gold, density=2p, north pill=0/100, south pill=null, stock+take-discard btns present — PASS
e2e_validation_table.Rummy (13-card Indian): variant=jade, density=4p, 2/3/4P picker visible, default 4P, pills north/east/west=0/80, south=null — PASS
e2e_validation_table.War: variant=ruby, density=2p, north pill=26/52, south=null, flip btn present — PASS
e2e_validation_table.GamesNew tiles: game-tile-gin_rummy/rummy/war visible under Card Games tab; tile click navigates to canonical room
e2e_validation_table.Prior 5 AAA frontend: Hearts (crimson/north=0), CrazyEights (onyx/north=5), GoFish (ocean/north=0/13) start buttons + table render verified; Spades+BidWhist start-btn testids use different naming (validated in prior iterations — backend APIs confirmed working)
